title: Classic British Apple Crumble
description: A traditional British dessert featuring tender apples topped with a crunchy oat and butter crumble mixture. Perfect for a cold winter's evening.

ingredients.name: Apples (Granny Smith)
ingredients.notes: Peel, core, and slice the apples

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the sliced apples, granulated sugar, and flour. Toss until the apples are evenly coated.
Transfer the apple mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, combine the crumbly topping ingredients (see below).
Evenly spread the crumbly topping over the apple mixture.
Dot the top of the crumble with the cold unsalted butter.
Bake for 40-50 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
